conflicts.description: Lin's rib scar is placed under the left rib line in chapter 1 and later left-side matches, but chapter 4 briefly describes it under the right ribs.
conflicts.canonical_value: Lin's unexplained pale rib scar is on the left side / left flank under the rib line.
conflicts.resolution_note: The left-side placement is established at first introduction and repeated in Warehouse Nine, the registry entry, and the Pelorus comparison; chapter 4's right-side reference is treated as the local inconsistency.

conflicts.description: The prior sheet delayed Lin's public status until chapter 16, but the manuscript makes Lin publicly identifiable in chapter 15 by filing witness testimony under the name Lin before the chapter 16 ruling.
conflicts.canonical_value: Lin becomes publicly identifiable in chapter 15 and is legally classified as a protected disputed claimant in chapter 16.
conflicts.resolution_note: The chapter 15 filing is the first irreversible public exposure; chapter 16 formalizes status but is not the first public appearance.

conflicts.description: The prior sheet ended Celia's presence at chapter 17, but chapter 18 shows her still at the terminal working on maker indexes and maintenance substitutions.
conflicts.canonical_value: Celia remains present through chapter 18 as a terminal maintenance strategist and maker-index source.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 17 brings her in with maintenance schematics; chapter 18 confirms continued on-page presence and work.

conflicts.description: The prior sheet collapsed Mira's evidence wafers into one 'Anomaly wafer', but the manuscript shows two distinct objects: a chapter 1 calibration wafer carrying LM-127B's residue packet and a chapter 6 archive mirror wafer carrying records data later used on Warehouse Nine.
conflicts.canonical_value: Track a chapter 1 calibration wafer and a separate chapter 6 archive mirror wafer.
conflicts.resolution_note: They have different origins, contents, and story functions, so combining them obscures the evidence chain.

conflicts.description: The prior sheet merged Celia's chapter 16 seed-map archive with later repair schematics, but the manuscript treats them as separate archives with different uses.
conflicts.canonical_value: Keep the chapter 16 seed-map archive and the chapter 17 maintenance-map folio as separate objects.
conflicts.resolution_note: The seed maps prove deliberate production intent; the maintenance maps are the practical service schematics used to keep bargain users alive after insolvency.
